title: May 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}
'''May 27''' is the 147th day (148th in leap years) of the year, with 218 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1922|1922]] – [[Christopher Lee]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Pete Sears]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Daniel Mindel]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Paul Bettany]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Michonne Bourriague]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 38|''Star Wars'' (1977) 38]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 107|''Star Wars'' (1977) 107]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Paul Gleason]] dies.
*[[2009]] – [[Legacy (2006) 36|''Legacy'' (2006) 36]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.8]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 1|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 1]] published in print.
*[[2026]] – [[Galaxy's Edge – Echoes of the Empire 2|''Galaxy's Edge – Echoes of the Empire'' 2]] to be published.
*2026 – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents 4|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents'' 4]] to be published.
